1.gl: a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire
1.kj: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

1.gl: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
1.kj: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

1.gl: an Elkoshite or native of Elkosh
1.dv: patrial from a name of uncertain derivation;

1.gl: a sight (mentally), i.e. a dream, revelation, or oracle

2.gl: a master; hence, a husband, or (figuratively) owner (often used with another noun in modifications of this latter sense)
2.kj: [phrase] archer, [phrase] babbler, [phrase] bird, captain, chief man, [phrase] confederate, [phrase] have to do, [phrase] dreamer, those to whom it is due, [phrase] furious, those

2.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
2.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
2.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

2.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
2.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

2.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
2.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to grudge, i.e. avenge or punish
2.kj: avenge(-r, self), punish, revenge (self), [idiom] surely, take vengeance.

3.gl: a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda

3.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
3.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

3.gl: vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard
3.kj: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.
3.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

3.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
3.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

4.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
4.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

4.gl: to be ashamed, confused or disappointed; also (as failing) to dry up (as water) or wither (as herbage)
4.kj: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).

4.gl: to parch (through drought) i.e. (by analogy,) to desolate, destroy, kill
4.kj: decay, (be) desolate, destroy(-er), (be) dry (up), slay, [idiom] surely, (lay, lie, make) waste.

4.gl: Karmel, the name of a hill and of a town in Palestine
a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity
Lebanon, a mountain range in Palestine
4.dv: from H3825 (לְבַב); (the) white mountain (from its snow);

5.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)

5.gl: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine
